title: Hedlundia hazslinszkyana

It is valued for its calming and soothing properties, and has been traditionally used to alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, providing relief from stress and promoting a restful sleep. The bioactive constituents of Hedlundia hazslinszkyana include flavonoids, terpenoids, and sesquiterpenes, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
